min_entry_age.source_quote: between the age of eighteen years and sixty five years

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum entry age of any family member is sixty five years

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: Children between the age of three months and eighteen years may be covered

grace_period.source_quote: Grace Period for payment of the premium shall be thirty days

free_look_period.source_quote: free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: First 30 days waiting period (Excl 03) a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within thirty (30) days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Diseases (Excl 01) a) Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of thirty six (36) months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 90 days/ one year/ two year/ three years (as specified against specific disease/ procedure)

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity (including Baby from Birth Cover) (per insured person, in a policy year, waiting period of 2 years applies) Up to INR 30,000 for normal de

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (National Parivar Mediclaim covers 140+ day care procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote:
Where treatment has been taken in a zone, other than the one for which ** premium has been paid, the claim shall be subject to
copayment.

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment The Company shall indemnify Medical Expenses incurred for Inpatient Care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines during each Policy Period up to the limit of Sum Insured as specified in the Policy Schedule in any AYUSH Hospital.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.14 Maternity The Company shall indemnify Maternity Expenses as described below for any female Insured Person, and also Pre-Natal and Post-Natal Hospitalisation expenses per delivery, including expenses for necessary vaccination for New Born Baby

newborn_coverage.source_quote: New Born Baby shall be automatically covered from birth under the Sum Insured available to the mother during the corresponding Policy Period, for up to 3 months of age.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor's Medical Expenses The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred in respect of an organ donor's Hospitalisation during the Policy Period for harvesting of the organ donated to an Insured Person

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Reinstatement of Sum Insured due to Road Traffic Accident In the event of the sum insured being exhausted on account of claims arising out of any injury due to road traffic accident during a policy year

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: 1.2.4 Domiciliary Hospitalisation The Company shall indemnify the medical expenses incurred under domiciliary hospitalization, including Pre Hospitalisation expenses and Post Hospitalisation expenses up to the limit mentioned in the Table of Benefits.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: Health Check Up Expenses of health check up shall be reimbursed (irrespective of past claims) at the end of a block of two continuous policy years, provided the Policy has been continuously renewed with the Company without a break.

critical_illness_cover.source_quote: Pre-existing Diabetes and/or Hypertension, Outpatient Treatment and Critical Illness are provided as Optional Covers.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility is available if opted for TPA service, subject to prior approval by the TPA

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: pre-authorization letter within an hour to the hospital after verification

room_rent_capping.value: Plan A: per Table of Benefits per-day limit; Plan B/C: higher caps. No cap if treated in PPN packaged listed procedure.
room_rent_capping.source_quote: 1.2.1.1 Limit for Room Charges and Intensive Care Unit Charges Room charges and intensive care unit charges per day shall be payable up to the limit as shown in the Table of Benefits, for Plan A only.
